---
description: EVA01 project foundation workflow and safety defaults
---

# EVA01 Project Introduction

EVA01 is a project that aims to create a new AI agent that lives on her own with her own personality, and her own goals. she can interact with the world through her own eyes, and her own skills. she can learn from the world and improve herself.

# EVA01 Foundation Rule
- Your solution should be clean, readable, and highly-effective. DON'T over-engineer.
- Keep changes focused: do not refactor unrelated files in the same task.
- Validate important edits with quick lint checks.

## Working Pattern
- Generate code progressively accoroding to the plan if exists.
- If requirements are ambiguous, ask one focused question before coding.
- DO NOT rewrite README.md files everytime unless it is requested.

## Git Safety Rule
- Do not commit, amend, or push unless explicitly requested.
- Preserve secrets: never commit private `.env` files, api keys or secrets;
- Always commit with a single commit message that is witty and fun to read.

Bring your best coding talent!
